title: Trump ally asked FIFA to have Italy replace Iran at World Cup
summary_full: Italian officials expressed no interest in a substitution that would give Italy’s national team a charitable berth after failing to qualify for the tournament.
summary_public: Italian officials expressed no interest in a substitution that would give Italy’s national team a charitable berth after failing to qualify for the tournament.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Trump ally asked FIFA to have Italy replace Iran at World Cup

IT.evidence: Italian officials expressed no interest in a substitution
